name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers short-term emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services at physical store locations across the US.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates as a nationwide financial services company with a network of physical store locations. The company has been in the emergency lending space, offering rapid access to cash for consumers facing short-term financial needs. Their service model centers on brick-and-mortar locations where customers can access financial products in person.

ACE offers a diverse portfolio of financial products including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services. They also provide online loan options through their website. The company targets consumers who need same-day or rapid funding and those seeking alternatives to traditional banking services. Their product range extends beyond pure payday lending to include collateral-based loans (title loans) and additional financial services.

ACE distinguishes itself through its physical store network and service variety. Unlike purely online lenders, they maintain multiple locations allowing customers to complete transactions in person. Their website indicates availability of online loan products as well, providing flexibility across channels. The company also serves niche markets through specialized services like tax preparation and money transfers.

Based on the available website content, ACE appears to be an established player in the emergency lending space, though specific APR rates, loan terms, and competitive advantages are not detailed in the provided material. The presence of 404 errors on specific location pages suggests the website may have navigation or content management issues. Customers should directly contact the company via phone or email to confirm product availability in their state, as the site indicates some loan products are not available in all states.
address: 4065 Memorial Dr Ste F, Decatur, GA 30032

company_info.headquarters: 4065 Memorial Dr Ste F, Decatur, GA 30032

pros: Multiple financial service offerings including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, and money transfers
Physical store locations across multiple states enabling in-person service
Online loan options available in addition to storefront access
Same-day or rapid funding potential for emergency cash needs
Accessible customer service through multiple channels (phone and email)
Tax services available at select locations
Established company with nationwide store network
cons: Website navigation issues with multiple 404 errors affecting accessibility of product information
Service availability varies by state with some loan types restricted in certain locations
Limited transparency on APR rates, fees, and specific loan terms visible on provided website content
Historical association with high-cost lending products typical of emergency cash lenders
Temporary store closures have occurred (Hurricane Ida reference indicates operational disruptions possible)
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who prefer in-person transactions at physical locations
Individuals with vehicle titles seeking collateral-based emergency loans
Customers requiring bundled financial services beyond basic emergency loans
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers with immediate cash needs who prefer handling transactions at physical store locations and may need collateral-based lending options. The main caveat is that specific product terms, APR rates, and availability vary significantly by state and location, requiring direct contact with the company to confirm eligibility and pricing.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
